rationale: Top-of-form domestic business-corporation name (the corporation that previously filed the now-being-abandoned entity conversion or charter surrender). Domestic Maine filing — uses entity.name (not entity.home_jurisdiction_name).

label_verbatim: FIRST: ...before the entity conversion has become effective on ___
rationale: Future effective date set on the original Articles of Entity Conversion (MBCA-21) or Articles of Charter Surrender (MBCA-20A). Same key as MBCA-20 / MBCA-20B / MBCA-21 / MBCA-20A conversion.future_effective_date — reused per MBCA-20B precedent rather than coining a new conversion.scheduled_effective_date. The §958 rule is that abandonment must be filed BEFORE this date.
Date the abandonment statement is signed.
